name: socc-skills
description: A 12-skill depth pack for the ACM Symposium on Cloud Computing (SoCC), the only conference jointly sponsored by ACM SIGMOD and SIGOPS: the systems+data intersection of cloud research, the two-round-per-year deadline model with a rebuttal, dual-anonymous acmart/sigconf submission, systems-building and measurement/experience papers alike, cloud-economics and data-market scope, and ACM artifact/reproducibility badging. Grounded in the SoCC 2026 (Singapore) and SoCC 2025 calls, acmsocc.org, ACM DL, and dblp checked on 2026-07-09.
